---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Configure '...'
2. Run '...'
3. Observe '...'

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Environment:**
- Arduino IDE version: [e.g. 2.3.8]
- ESP32 board package: [e.g. 3.3.7]
- Library versions:
  - Adafruit BME280 Library: [e.g. 2.2.4]
  - ArduinoWebsockets: [e.g. 0.5.4]
  - ArduinoJson: [e.g. 7.4.2]
  - LiquidCrystal_I2C: [e.g. 1.1.2]
- SignalK Server version: [e.g. 2.23.0]

**Logs**
Paste Serial monitor output here:
```
(paste here)
```

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots of the LCD display or Serial monitor output.

**Which part is affected?**
- [ ] BME280 sensor reading
- [ ] SignalK WebSocket communication
- [ ] ESP-NOW broadcast
- [ ] LCD display
- [ ] WiFi / OTA
- [ ] Other / startup

**Hardware setup**
- [ ] ESP32 development board connected via USB
- [ ] BME280 sensor connected to I2C (SDA GPIO21, SCL GPIO22)
- [ ] LCD 16x2 connected (optional)
- [ ] WiFi router accessible

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
